hypothesis.topic: Quantum Fluctuation-driven Emergence of Topological Structures in Complex Systems
hypothesis.hypothesis: In complex systems exhibiting self-organization, quantum fluctuations induce the emergence of topological structures through a mechanism involving non-equilibrium thermodynamics and the Casimir effect, leading to a 10-20% increase in system complexity at critical temperatures.

invention.name: Project Alpha-Centauri
invention.concept: A specialized tool using Quantum Fluctuation-driven Emergence of Topological Structures in Complex Systems to optimize Computing.
